summary: v118 manually ports external support worker w52/w53 Dbounded ordinary triangulated-transfer audit probes in the parent worktree: one file records the hypotheses needed to apply Triangulated.Localization.pretriangulated to Dbounded.localization, and one proves a conditional LocalizerMorphism.localizedFunctor IsTriangulated transfer using CatCommSq and shift coherence. Product remains nonterminal because direct bounded triangulation compatibility, Dbounded localization triangulated inputs, and a genuine stable infinity-category certificate remain unproved.
